title: Yomai Style
description: Vanilla miscellaneous mod that adds small random things
body:
![Yomai Style Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c8c8fa54e58e7c4843a95b336d528e11da1136e5.png)
Yomai Style is a mod that adds fun & unique features to the game, whether it'd be building blocks, food, weapons or tools!

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-[Highlights]-

 
-Anvil on a Stick-

A new weapon that slows you down when hold, deals heavy damage and has slow attack speed. Can be repaired with Iron Blocks and can do a smash attack that sends enemies upwards if used while sneaking. The slowness effect can be lessened by a Strength effect


-Compost-

Randomly bone meals plants above it


-Hemolymph-

Can be used to craft a Slimeball. They can also be used to craft Hemolymph Apples that can show side effects when fed to arthropods..


-Chocolate-

Extends Haste Effect and can be used to craft new building blocks and food. Brownie gives Haste, Chocolate Bread extends Haste and gives Regeneration, Chocolate Apple extends Haste, gives Regeneration and Absorption. Chocolate Fountains and Chocolate Lamps can also be crafted and Chocolate Fountains will turn Bread & Apple into their Chocolate-covered counterparts upon a right-click. A new tool called the Chocolate Spoon can also be crafted, this tool has relatively low durability but one can sneak with a Chocolate Spoon in their hand to gain hunger in return of repairing the tool. Chocolate can be crafted into Chocolate Blocks and Bricks.

 
-Building Blocks-

Andesite, Granite, Diorite bricks and lamps, Obsidian variants, Stick blocks, Calcite variants, Steel and Rusty Steel and more


-Butter-

Butter can be crafted from smelting Cream. Butter can replace Wheat in recipes that use Wheat in them and will craft double the amount of the item. It can also double the amount of soups & stews which won't replace any ingredients


-Vinegar-

Will clean any dyed blocks upon a right-click. Can be crafted into Salad that has 17 saturation points and Chicken Salad that gives Resistance


-Pens-

Will dye any dyable blocks upon a right click with it's associated color


-Paper Lanterns and Soul Paper Lanterns-

New fancy light sources

 
Newly added features are detailed in the changelog! 

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

New Tags:

colored_wool [Blocks in this tag will turn into White Wool when cleaned with Vinegar]

colored_carpet [Blocks in this tag will turn into White Carpet when cleaned with Vinegar]

colored_concrete [Blocks in this tag will turn into White Concrete when cleaned with Vinegar]

colored_concrete_powder [Blocks in this tag will turn into White Concrete Powder when cleaned with Vinegar]

colored_banner [Blocks in this tag will turn into a White Banner when cleaned with Vinegar]

colored_wall_banner [Blocks in this tag will turn into a White Wall Banner when cleaned with Vinegar]

colored_terracotta [Blocks in this tag will turn into regular Terracotta when cleaned with Vinegar]

colored_glazed_terracotta [Blocks in this tag will turn into White Glazed Terracotta when cleaned with Vinegar]

colored_glass [Blocks in this tag will turn into regular Glass when cleaned with Vinegar]

colored_glass_pane [Blocks in this tag will turn into a regular Glass Pane when cleaned with Vinegar]

colored_candle [Blocks in this tag will turn into a regular Candle when cleaned with Vinegar]

colored_shulker_box [Blocks in this tag will turn into a regular Shulker Box when cleaned with Vinegar]

colored_blocks [All block tags that can be cleaned with Vinegar]

unsmashable [Mobs in this tag cannot be sent upwards when smashed with Anvil on a Stick]

rustable_blocks [Blocks in this tag can be rusted with a water bottle]

rusty_blocks [Blocks in this tag are rusted]

charges_copper [Items in this tag can charge copper blocks]

dyable_wool [Blocks in this tag are dyable to any color by pens]

dyable_carpet [Blocks in this tag are dyable to any color by pens]

dyable_concrete [Blocks in this tag are dyable to any color by pens]

dyable_concrete_powder [Blocks in this tag are dyable to any color by pens]

dyable_banner [Blocks in this tag are dyable to any color by pens]

dyable_wall_banner [Blocks in this tag are dyable to any color by pens]

dyable_terracotta [Blocks in this tag are dyable to any color by pens]

dyable_glazed_terracotta [Blocks in this tag are dyable to any color by pens]

dyable_glass [Blocks in this tag are dyable to any color by pens]

dyable_glass_pane [Blocks in this tag are dyable to any color by pens]

dyable_candle [Blocks in this tag are dyable to any color by pens]

dyable_shulker_box [Blocks in this tag are dyable to any color by pens]

dyable_blocks [All block tags that can be dyed with pens]

gun_block_ammo [Items in this tag are used by Gun Blocks to fire projectiles, currently only used by Bullet]

organic_mob [Mobs in this tag can digest]
